one_time_description: Other income of $5,553,147 in 2024 vs $2,458,145 in 2023 - significant increase suggesting possible non-recurring items; also City of Toronto accounts receivable of $1,115,829 appeared for first time in 2024
economic_notes: Operates Paradise Bingo (100% owned) and Munsee-Delaware Nation Charity Association (100% owned). Located in Muncey, Ontario.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - Nation does not have necessary information to determine if obligation needs to be recognized for buildings. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: 1748960 Ontario Limited o/a Paradise Bingo (100%) and Munsee-Delaware Nation Charity Association (100%). Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $1,663,026 + Health Canada $411,464 + CMHC $109,172 + Province of Ontario $1,008,036 + Southern First Nation Secretariat $354,413 + Ministry of Indigenous Affairs $17,093 + Kinomaadswin Education Body Inc. $1,302,847 + Anishinabek Nation $661,398 + Stepping Stones $844,796 = $6,372,245 (approximate). OSR includes rental income, interest income, OFNLP, and other income. Replacement reserve expense of $11,160 included in annual surplus calculation. City of Toronto receivable of $1,115,829 is new in 2024.
